_fixmes: partPath=1 (empty text/plain leaf) currently receives mailparser's aggregated `parsed.text`, which contains the HTML-stripped text of the sibling text/html part (62 bytes) instead of the empty bytes of the actual leaf. PR B's structural pairing must give this leaf a zero-byte Buffer — partId for empty parts isn't exposed by mailparser, so PR B should treat any text/plain leaf whose declared sizeOctets is 0 (or which has no matching partId) as empty.
